negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: common_sense_d0f4593b-05cb-4395-8196-9ec87245a3cb
prompt: The video captures an old man cooking in a cozy kitchen while carrying a child. The medium shot is taken at eye level, showcasing the man's focused yet gentle demeanor. He has short, gray hair and wears square, transparent glasses in a black frame. His black apron, adorned with red-colored letter designs, contrasts with his dark-colored t-shirt underneath. The man holds the child securely with his left hand, while his right hand skillfully stirs a semi-liquid mixture of white and green ingredients in a shiny silver pan on the black stove.  The child, dressed in red pants and a white full-sleeved t-shirt, curiously observes the cooking process. They both turn to their left as the man speaks, adding a dynamic element to the scene. The child's attention is captivated by the stirring action, and they hold onto the shiny silver chain on the man's neck with their left hand. The man picks up some white food with a wooden spatula and brings it to his mouth, while the child watches intently.  The kitchen setting is warm and inviting, with a black countertop in the foreground. On the counter, there's a wooden cutting board with a knife and white pieces of food, a wine glass filled with yellow liquid, and a red bowl. Another similar pan is visible on the stove to the left. Behind the man, a large beige wooden cabinet houses a black baking oven and a shiny, dark-grey side-by-side refrigerator. The fridge is decorated with numerous pictures, and a gray cloth hangs on the shiny handle. Above the refrigerator, books and a small plant add a personal touch to the space. The gray wall on the left features four black frames, completing the homely atmosphere.
